problem: How are long-term memories physically encoded in neural tissue?
hypothesis: If Psychedelic-induced neuroplasticity via 5-HT2A receptor is applied to in, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
